region.name: Mornington Peninsula
region.climateNote: Cool maritime climate; no vineyard more than 7km from ocean; 723km² GI area
region.distanceFromMelbourne: ~1 hour drive south from Melbourne CBD

redHillSouth.label: Red Hill South
redHillSouth.character: Highest elevations on the plateau; oldest vines; Pinot Noir benchmark; strongest concentration of hatted restaurants

mainRidge.label: Main Ridge
mainRidge.character: Peninsula's highest sub-region; coolest; quietest; minimal signage; where serious Pinot comes from

merricks.label: Merricks
merricks.character: Bay-facing gentle slopes; Pt. Leo Estate and Stonier; the sculpture park zone

merricksNorth.label: Merricks North
merricksNorth.character: Jackalope / Rare Hare / Doot Doot Doot epicentre; design-forward; the 'scene' end
wineries: Jackalope / Rare Hare (Willow Creek / LL Vineyard)

tuerong.label: Tuerong
tuerong.character: Northern belt; Yabby Lake and Dromana Estate; Italian variety pioneer zone

dromana.label: Dromana
dromana.character: Gateway area; Crittenden Estate; lakeside setting

redHill.label: Red Hill
redHill.character: Village zone; Polperro and Foxeys and Red Hill area; biodynamic pioneers

balnarring.label: Balnarring
balnarring.character: North-east area; Quealy Winemakers; Pinot Gris pioneer territory

moorooduc.label: Moorooduc
moorooduc.character: Northern tip; Moorooduc Estate; accessible from Frankston

wineries.name: Montalto
wineries.address: 33 Shoreham Road, Red Hill South VIC 3937
wineries.restaurantDays: Restaurant Fri–Mon (booking required); Piazza 7 days walk-in 11am–5pm
wineries.bookingNote: Restaurant requires booking; Piazza walk-in daily
wineries.dogPolicy: Not confirmed in dog-friendly guides — assume no
wineries.familyNote: Sculpture walk + gardens; wine terrace good for families
wineries.views: Sweeping vineyard + sculpture trail + Western Port

wineries.name: Pt. Leo Estate
wineries.restaurantDays: Laura: Thu–Mon lunch; Sat dinner. Pt. Leo Restaurant: daily (seasonal). Wine Terrace: casual daily.
wineries.dogPolicy: Not confirmed — large outdoor sculpture park likely on-lead permissible but unconfirmed
wineries.familyNote: 16-acre sculpture park; wine terrace lawn; children under 12 free entry to sculpture park
wineries.views: Western Port Bay and Phillip Island
wineries.dining: Laura (2 hats GFG 2025); Pt. Leo Restaurant (AGFG); Wine Terrace (casual)
wineries.sculptureParkEntry: $15 adult; $30 family (2 adults + 2 children 12–17); under 12 free

wineries.name: Ten Minutes by Tractor
wineries.restaurantDays: Wed–Sun lunch; Fri–Sat dinner; Mon–Tue closed
wineries.dining: Hatted restaurant; Allis wine bar (Fri–Sat 11am–9pm; Sun 11am–6pm)
wineries.special: First certified organic vineyard on Peninsula

wineries.name: Port Phillip Estate
wineries.address: 263 Red Hill Road, Red Hill VIC 3937
wineries.views: Vineyard + Port Phillip Bay panorama; architectural landmark

wineries.name: Paringa Estate
wineries.address: 44 Paringa Road, Red Hill South VIC 3941
wineries.restaurantDays: Restaurant Wed–Sun lunch; Sat dinner. Garden Dining walk-in Wed–Sun 12–3pm.
wineries.dining: AGFG hatted restaurant; Garden Dining casual tier

wineries.name: Polperro
wineries.address: 150 Red Hill Road, Red Hill VIC 3937
wineries.winter: Fire pits set up in winter across the hillside

wineries.name: Quealy Winemakers
wineries.dogPolicy: NO DOGS — 'We kindly ask no dogs'
wineries.special: Kathleen Quealy credited as pioneer of Pinot Gris in Australia

wineries.name: Main Ridge Estate
wineries.cellarDoorHours: Fri–Sun 12–5pm + public holidays; every day Dec 27–Australia Day weekend
wineries.cellarDoorNote: Closed Good Friday, Christmas, Boxing Day, ANZAC Day, Melbourne Cup Day
wineries.restaurantDays: Larder restaurant; share plates; outdoor only
wineries.bookingNote: Must tick dog box when booking; dogs at capacity = unavailable
wineries.dogPolicy: Yes — on-lead; must pre-book; outdoor only; max 1 dog per booking
wineries.familyNote: Small group max 8; outdoor seating; dogs on-lead

wineries.name: Red Hill Estate
wineries.addressNote: Some older sources cite 53 Shoreham Rd — verify; current primary source shows 1208 Mornington-Flinders Rd
wineries.reviewNote: Address discrepancy; cellar door days low confidence

wineries.name: T'Gallant
wineries.dining: Pizzeria + cellar door; wood-fired pizza; piazza seating; weekend live music
wineries.operatingNote: Closed ~April 2022; REOPENED mid-2023 with new Bergman & Co design fit-out

wineries.name: Foxeys Hangout
wineries.address: 795 White Hill Road, Red Hill VIC 3937
wineries.cellarDoorHours: Fri–Mon + public holidays 11am–5pm; tastings every day 11am–5pm
wineries.dogPolicy: NO DOGS — 'Please leave your lovely dogs at home'
wineries.special: First Peninsula winery with full organic and biodynamic certification
wineries.sisterVenue: Morning Sun (Main Creek Rd, Main Ridge; Thu–Sun; Italian-inspired — verify current status)

wineries.name: Stonier Wines
wineries.cellarDoorNote: Walk-in friendly; groups 8+ contact in advance
wineries.special: Pioneer winery; some of oldest vines on Peninsula

wineries.name: Yabby Lake
wineries.dogPolicy: Possibly dog-friendly (TrustedHousesitters) — NOT confirmed on primary source
wineries.reviewNote: Dog policy not confirmed on venue site

wineries.name: Crittenden Estate
wineries.restaurantDays: The Crittenden Restaurant: Wed–Sun lunch; Fri–Sat dinner (verify post-renovation)
wineries.restaurantNote: Formerly 'Stillwater at Crittenden'. Renamed and relaunched under new chef after renovation.
wineries.familyNote: Expansive outdoor lawns; lake; ducks; games (cricket/football)
wineries.special: First to commercialise Italian varieties in Australia
wineries.accommodation: 3 luxury self-contained villas over the lake
wineries.reviewNote: Restaurant days low confidence post-renovation; verify current trading

wineries.name: Moorooduc Estate
wineries.cellarDoorHours: 10am–5pm 7 days; closed Good Friday, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day, Boxing Day, NYE, NYD, ANZAC Day (until noon)

wineries.name: Dromana Estate
wineries.dogPolicy: Possibly dog-friendly (TrustedHousesitters) — not confirmed on primary source

dogFriendlyConfirmed.name: Stonier Wines
dogFriendlyConfirmed.note: Lawn is dog-friendly. Confirmed on venue site.

dogFriendlyConfirmed.name: Main Ridge Estate
dogFriendlyConfirmed.note: On-lead only. Must pre-book with dog. Outdoor only. Max 1 dog per booking.

dogFriendlyConfirmed.name: Green Olive at Red Hill
dogFriendlyConfirmed.note: Outdoor dining areas. Multiple sources confirmed.

dogFriendlyExplicitlyNo.name: Foxeys Hangout
dogFriendlyExplicitlyNo.note: 'Please leave your lovely dogs at home' — stated on website.

dogFriendlyExplicitlyNo.name: Quealy Winemakers
dogFriendlyExplicitlyNo.note: 'We kindly ask no dogs' — stated on cellar door page.
